Class FhirServerQuerySuffixBuilder

java.lang.Object
de.ukbonn.mwtek.dashboard.misc.FhirServerQuerySuffixBuilder
All Implemented Interfaces:
QuerySuffixBuilder
public class FhirServerQuerySuffixBuilder extends Object implements QuerySuffixBuilder
Building the templates of the individual REST requests to the Acuwaveles server.

  • Method Details

    • getObservations

      public String getObservations(AbstractDataRetrievalService dataRetrievalService, Integer month, boolean summary, DataItemContext dataItemContext, boolean httpMethodGet)
      Description copied from interface: QuerySuffixBuilder
      The retrieval of FHIR MiiObservation resources.
      Specified by:
      getObservations in interface QuerySuffixBuilder
      Parameters:
      dataRetrievalService - The corresponding data search service.
      month - The calendar month for which data is requested. (for parallelization).
      summary - Should only the bundle with the total number of found resources be output instead of the data retrieval query?
      httpMethodGet - Is HttpMethod.GET used?
      Returns:
      A list of all FHIR observation resources that include a covid finding.

    • getConditions

      public String getConditions(AbstractDataRetrievalService dataRetrievalService, Integer month, boolean summary, DataItemContext dataItemContext, Boolean httpMethodGet)
      Description copied from interface: QuerySuffixBuilder
      The retrieval of FHIR MiiCondition resources.
      Specified by:
      getConditions in interface QuerySuffixBuilder
      Parameters:
      dataRetrievalService - The corresponding data search service.
      month - The calendar month for which data is requested. (for parallelization)
      summary - Should only the bundle with the total number of found resources be output instead of the data retrieval query?
      httpMethodGet - Is HttpMethod.GET used?
      Returns:
      A list of all FHIR condition resources that include a covid diagnosis.

    • getConditions

      public String getConditions(AbstractDataRetrievalService fhirDataRetrievalService, List<String> encounterIds, Boolean httpMethodGet)

    • getPatients

      public String getPatients(AbstractDataRetrievalService dataRetrievalService, List<String> patientIdList)
      Description copied from interface: QuerySuffixBuilder
      The retrieval of FHIR MiiPatient resources.
      Specified by:
      getPatients in interface QuerySuffixBuilder
      Parameters:
      dataRetrievalService - The corresponding data search service.
      patientIdList - A list with patient ids used as input criteria.
      Returns:
      A list of all requested FHIR patient resources.

    • getPatients

      public String getPatients(AbstractDataRetrievalService dataRetrievalService, Integer calendarYear)
      Description copied from interface: QuerySuffixBuilder
      The retrieval of FHIR MiiPatient resources with birthdate in the given calendar year.
      Specified by:
      getPatients in interface QuerySuffixBuilder
      Parameters:
      dataRetrievalService - The corresponding data search service.
      calendarYear - The calendar year in which the date of birth must fall.
      Returns:
      A list of all requested FHIR patient resources.
